exercises.original: The university revised its curriculum to include more practical modules.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: The university updated its syllabus to add more hands-on modules.

exercises.original: Attendance at these lectures is mandatory.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Students are required to attend these lectures.

exercises.original: A significant portion of the rural population remains illiterate.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: A large share of people in rural areas still cannot read or write.

exercises.original: Childhood obesity rates have doubled in the last decade.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: The number of overweight children has doubled over the past ten years.

exercises.original: A sedentary lifestyle increases the risk of heart disease.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Living an inactive lifestyle raises the chances of developing heart disease.

exercises.original: Diabetes is a chronic condition that requires lifelong management.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Diabetes is a long-term illness that needs to be managed for life.

exercises.original: Artificial intelligence is reshaping many industries.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Machine-based intelligence is transforming numerous sectors.

exercises.original: Many factory workers were made redundant due to automation.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Automation has left many factory workers without jobs.

exercises.original: Companies are investing more in cybersecurity than ever before.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Firms are spending more on protecting their data than at any time in the past.

exercises.original: The company adopted sustainable manufacturing practices.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: The company began manufacturing in ways that do not deplete resources.

exercises.original: New policies aim to mitigate the effects of climate change.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: New policies are designed to lessen the impact of climate change.

exercises.original: Deforestation is a major cause of habitat loss.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: The clearing of forests is one of the main reasons animals lose their habitats.

exercises.original: Unemployment rates rose sharply during the recession.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: The number of people without jobs rose sharply during the economic downturn.

exercises.original: Inflation has eroded people's purchasing power.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Rising prices have reduced how much people can buy with their money.

exercises.original: Remote work has been shown to increase productivity for some employees.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Working from home has been found to boost efficiency for certain staff.

exercises.original: The city is known for its cultural diversity.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: The city is famous for having such a wide variety of cultures.

exercises.original: Laws exist to prevent discrimination in the workplace.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Legislation is in place to stop unfair treatment of employees at work.

exercises.original: Income inequality has widened significantly in recent years.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: The gap between rich and poor has grown considerably in recent years.

exercises.original: Bali remains a popular tourist destination.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Bali continues to be a favourite place for tourists to visit.

exercises.original: Travelers seek authentic local experiences rather than tourist traps.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Tourists look for genuine local experiences instead of overly commercial ones.

exercises.original: Traffic congestion in tourist areas peaks during holidays.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Tourist areas become most overcrowded with traffic during holiday periods.

exercises.original: Harsher penalties are seen as a deterrent to crime.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Stricter punishments are believed to discourage people from committing crimes.

exercises.original: Rehabilitation programs help reduce reoffending rates.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: Programs that reform offenders help lower the rate at which they commit further crimes.

exercises.original: New legislation was passed to combat cybercrime.
exercises.sampleParaphrase: New laws were introduced to fight crimes committed online.
